\tzpentry{ID11389}{Redshift Drift Breathing Observable}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The redshift drift observable compares present breathing rate with the historical Hubble rate at redshift z.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\dot z=(1+z)H_{0}-H(z)
